(1 comment)

> (1 comment)
 > 
 > 1. What is the common Cassandra version? Today SDC works with 2.1.9
   The comman cassandra has library/cassandra:3.11.
 > 2. Did you run tests and verified everything works with these
 > changes?
   I have run few basic tests (using APIs), also all related to the connectivity and verified that all the application PODs were able to connect with shared cassandra and use it as I believed the changes are not functional, but let me know if we need to run more scenarios which can be executed in standalone SDC then I will execute them.

I've just seen the other commit, looks good.

I expect some issues with upgrading to Cassandra 3.x, therefore before merging you'd have to run sanity tests, like the ones in CSIT: https://jenkins.onap.org/view/sdc/
This can be done by running the dedicated tests docker images like sdc-api-test.

Please send me the output of these tests so we can analyze the impact. Thanks
